experiments.title: Brutalist Constructivist SDF Blocks
experiments.geometry_idea: Overlapping cube primitives with chamfered edges, boolean subtraction for windows, smooth SDF union
experiments.color_system: Concrete gray base, red accent panels, white trim
experiments.motion_idea: Camera orbit with slow zoom, occasional window pulse
experiments.blender_approach: Geometry nodes with cube distribution on grid, boolean modifier stack
experiments.ae_touchdesigner_approach: AE shape layers with trim paths, TD SOP for live boolean
experiments.audio_force_hook: Window intensity mapped to bass frequency

experiments.title: Gothic Arches + Volumetric Light Rays
experiments.geometry_idea: Pointed arch arrays, ribbed vaulting, rose window geometry
experiments.color_system: Stone beige, stained glass jewel tones, god ray white-gold
experiments.motion_idea: Light rays sweep through arches, dust particles drift
experiments.blender_approach: Volumetric fog + spot lights with gobos, curve-based arch generation
experiments.ae_touchdesigner_approach: TD GLSL volumetric shader, AE CC light rays on comp
experiments.audio_force_hook: Light intensity pulses with choir/strings

experiments.title: Bauhaus Grid Kinetic Typography
experiments.geometry_idea: Modular grid system, geometric letterforms, square and circle primitives
experiments.color_system: Primary colors (red, blue, yellow), black, white
experiments.motion_idea: Letters slide on grid, rotate 90-degree snaps, scale in/out
experiments.blender_approach: Geometry nodes with text to curve, array modifiers on grid
experiments.ae_touchdesigner_approach: AE shape layer text animator with position/rotation, TD text TOP + transform
experiments.audio_force_hook: Letter movement triggered by rhythmic beats

experiments.title: Baroque Ornament Displacement Fields
experiments.geometry_idea: Flowing acanthus leaves, scrollwork, shell motifs displaced by noise

experiments.motion_idea: Ornaments breathe/undulate, camera push through details

experiments.title: Cubist Projection Mapping Fractured Planes

experiments.motion_idea: Planes rotate independently, reveal different views simultaneously

experiments.title: Futurist Speed Lines + Force-Field Motion
experiments.geometry_idea: Dynamic lines converging to vanishing point, motion blur trails
experiments.color_system: Electric blue, orange, silver metallic gradients
experiments.motion_idea: Lines accelerate toward camera, burst patterns, directional flow

experiments.title: Abstract Expressionist Particle Turbulence
experiments.geometry_idea: Chaotic particle swarms, brush-stroke-like trails, layered depth
experiments.color_system: Black, white, raw umber, cadmium red accents
experiments.motion_idea: Particles drip, splash, swirl with turbulence noise
experiments.blender_approach: Particle system + turbulence force field, curve trails with taper
experiments.ae_touchdesigner_approach: AE particular plugin with turbulence, TD particle TOP feedback loop

experiments.title: Suprematist Modular Architecture
experiments.geometry_idea: Floating rectangles, squares, circles in 3D space, no gravity
experiments.color_system: Black, white, red, occasional yellow/blue
experiments.motion_idea: Shapes drift slowly, rotate on single axis, maintain spatial tension
experiments.blender_approach: Simple primitive meshes with slow animation curves, negative space emphasis
experiments.ae_touchdesigner_approach: AE 3D layers with null parenting, TD SOP geometry with slow transforms
experiments.audio_force_hook: Shape drift speed modulated by ambient pad textures

experiments.title: De Stijl Color Grid Animation
experiments.geometry_idea: Orthogonal grid of rectangles, asymmetric balance, flat planes
experiments.color_system: Primary red/blue/yellow, black lines, white background
experiments.motion_idea: Grid cells scale in/out, lines extend/retract, stagger timing
experiments.blender_approach: Array modifier grid with shape key animation per cell
experiments.ae_touchdesigner_approach: AE shape layer grid with trim paths expression, TD CHOP-driven rectangles

experiments.title: Op Art Moire Field Tests
experiments.geometry_idea: Concentric circles, parallel lines, warped grids creating optical vibration
experiments.color_system: High contrast black/white, occasional chromatic aberration

experiments.title: Analog CRT Smear + Feedback Concept

experiments.title: Point-Cloud Perceived Depth Map

experiments.title: Light Physics Caustic Card Study

experiments.color_system: White light source, rainbow caustic dispersion, neutral surfaces
experiments.motion_idea: Light source rotates slowly, caustic patterns shift and focus

experiments.title: Low-Poly Shatter Architectural Frame
